name: storm-cloud-plugin
description: Creates storm catalogs from NOAA AORC precipitation data and converts to HEC-DSS files.

AORC._comment: OPTIONAL. Provide to read AORC from a private/regional S3 mirror (faster); omit for the anonymous NOAA public bucket. src/aorc_env.py maps these AORC_AWS_* creds to the AORC_S3_* names stormhub reads and derives s3://<aws_s3_bucket> (set AORC_S3_PREFIX in environment if the year zarrs live under a bucket prefix).
